_budget_derivation: 3D-active script-size budget = baseline eager budget (184643 bytes, lighthouserc.json / 04-02) + the three+fiber lazy chunk transfer size measured in 04-03 (227 KB gzip = 232448 bytes, KiB) + 10% margin. (184643 + 232448) * 1.10 = 458800.1, rounded up to 458801. This is the ONLY assertion widened vs. baseline (RESEARCH Open Question 1 option a) — LCP/TBT/CLS/perf thresholds and severities are identical to lighthouserc.json (T-04-04-01). The default lighthouserc.json stays byte-identical to its 04-02 state; the representative CI gate's URLs carry no ?webgl param, so this config never runs in the blocking CI job — it is a documented lab-audit script (`pnpm lhci:webgl`), evidence for 04-05's production verification, not a merge gate (D-11).
_kontinuum_rebaseline: Re-baselined at 05-integration (2026-07-18, local Lighthouse against the pnpm-start production build with the stage mounted): total script transfer with the Kontinuum stage chunk loaded = 452074 bytes on /de and /en (stable across runs); eager-only (?webgl=off, the CI-blocking condition) = 181165 bytes, so the measured lazy stage payload = 270909 bytes (three+fiber + formation engine + builders + glyph JSON + producers/conductor). Budget per the mandated formula: (184643 eager budget + 270909 measured lazy) * 1.10 = 501107.2, rounded up to 501108. Still a documented lab audit (`pnpm lhci:webgl`), never a blocking merge gate (D-11).
